texto: You should always strive to make amazing things happen in your life
autor: instead of making excuses on why they are not happening. Vow to stop complaining and start doing.
explicacao: Orientação direta de instead of making excuses on why they are not happening. Vow to stop complaining and start doing. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “You should always strive to make amazing things happen in your life” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, inspiracional, should, útil em momentos de inspiracao e reflexao.
